title: 6 Pcs Ratchet Tie Down Straps, 2m x 20mm Small Ratchet Straps Heavy Duty 250kg(550lbs), Adjustable Black Lashing Straps with Buckle for Vans, Motorcycle, Trucks, Trailer, Luggage, Cargo
features: 【Strong Tie Down Power】Our tie down straps are 2 meters long and 20 mm wide, providing strong tie-down power, making them ideal for the safe transport of most cargo. Whether its large furniture, bicycles, motorcycles or bulky camping equipment, these black ratchet straps ensure optimal fixation in any situation and protect objects from scratches and damage.

【Versatile Uses】These TXIXING tie down straps are perfect for securing bicycles, suitcase loads, cargo and luggage. Perfect for camping, going to the beach, skiing and outdoor sports. They also ensure items remain secure and intact during road trips, boat trips and when transporting garden furniture or building materials.

【Unique Design】The button on the solid metal buckle allows for one-handed operation. The ratchet straps with clip lock are robust and can withstand a weight of 250 kg, making them ideal for tying and securing cargo. The kit contains 6 interchangeable ratchet straps, ideal for tying pallet tires.

【Easy to Install】The tie down straps are easy to install, without the need to tie and untie knots. Simply wrap the webbing around the item you want to secure, open the zinc alloy buckle, thread the webbing through and pull it tight. Then close the buckle to secure everything in place. This saves time and ensures your load stays tight and secure.

【High Quality Material】Tie down straps are made of durable and lightweight polyester to protect the surface of your items without deformation or corrosion. Easy-to-use zinc alloy pressure buckles provide additional stability. Due to their compact size, these TAIXING ratchet straps heavy duty are easy to transport and carry. These hooks are exceptionally durable and can withstand over 10,000 uses.
description: Product Description Specifications Material: Polyester Fiber and Rust-Proof Zinc Alloy Length: 200 cm Width: 20 mm Color: Black Package contains: 6 * Tension Straps with Clamp Lock Strong and Sturdy The lashing strap is made of high-quality polyester fiber and zinc alloy, which has good resistance to deformation and aging. With a maximum load of 250 kg, you can work safely. Perfect Travel Ratchet tie down straps are ideal for securing light loads. They are long and strong enough to attach bicycles, kayaks, moving canoes or other items to roof racks or trailers.
